• Design and build AI-powered applications using Gemini and other LLMs to solve specific
business use cases beyond standard chat interfaces.
• Develop autonomous and semi-autonomous agentic workflows using Vertex AI Agent Builder,
ADK, or similar frameworks.
• Build multi-agent systems capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and orchestration.
• Design and implement agent-to-agent (A2A) communication patterns for collaborative task
execution.
• Integrate AI agents with enterprise platforms such as Salesforce, ServiceNow, Workday,
Snowflake, and Atlassian tools via APIs.
• Build evaluation and testing frameworks to measure output quality, reliability, and
trustworthiness in production environments.

Job Description for Senior AI Engineer

• Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using embeddings and vector
search.

• Contribute reusable blueprints, design patterns, and reference architectures for enterprise-
wide adoption of agentic workflows.

• Deploy and operate AI systems in cloud environments (e.g., Cloud Run), including monitoring,
prompt/version management, and performance tracking.
• Collaborate with engineering, data, and business teams to ensure scalable, secure, and
maintainable AI implementations.Required Skills s Experience:
• We care about what you can do and what you’ve built- not where you went to school. To excel in
a Gemini-first environment, you need:
• 5–8 years of experience in AI/ML engineering, software engineering, or applied AI systems.
• Hands-on experience building and deploying applications that interact with Large Language
Models in production.
• Strong programming fundamentals with experience designing scalable APIs and distributed
systems.
• Experience building agentic or multi-step LLM workflows using modern frameworks.
• Practical understanding of retrieval systems, embeddings, and RAG architectures.
• Experience integrating AI systems with third-party enterprise APIs.
• Strong understanding of software security, reliability, and scalability principles.
• Experience deploying AI workloads to cloud environments and managing operational concerns
(monitoring, versioning, logging).
• Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Vertex AI and Gemini API ecosystem.
Preferred Skills :
• Experience with Vertex AI Agent Builder or similar orchestration frameworks.
• Familiarity with Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar structured model-tool interaction
patterns.
• Experience designing multi-agent (A2A) communication and orchestration strategies.
• SQL proficiency and experience working with Snowflake or similar data warehouses.
• Experience implementing evaluation frameworks for LLM performance and hallucination
reduction.
• Experience building reusable AI blueprints or internal developer platforms.
• Exposure to enterprise SaaS ecosystems (Salesforce, ServiceNow, Workday, Atlassian).
